close_reason: Final hardening complete. Full verification passed: git diff --check, mix format --check-formatted, mix compile --warnings-as-errors, mix test, mix credo --strict, mix docs --warnings-as-errors, and mix doctor --raise. Coverage previously measured at 76.0%, package dry runs succeeded, and remaining large xref cycle is deferred as architectural follow-up.
description:
Purpose: close the milestone with a full-package review.

Done when:
- all verification passes
- remaining known gaps are documented as post-V3 work
- the package has one coherent V3 story from README to tests
title: V3 E18: Final hardening
